tagline: Fixed back navigation error: Resolved a bug where clicking the browser back button while viewing a Genie Space would result in an error.
what_it_does: Fixed back navigation error: Resolved a bug where clicking the browser back button while viewing a Genie Space would result in an error. Fixed entity matching documentation link: Fixed a broken link to the description of entity matching (previously value dictionaries). Improved column selection: Genie now optimizes column selection to provide more columns with higher relevance while efficiently managing context consumption.
why_it_matters: Improved column selection: Genie now optimizes column selection to provide more columns with higher relevance while efficiently managing context consumption.
key_takeaway: Fixed back navigation error: Resolved a bug where clicking the browser back button while viewing a Genie Space would result in an error.
